text: carbs is 35g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

on the plus side. usually better than just grabbing candy because the misc rules should reward a functional upgrade when it is real. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides. still easy to overrate as a health food because a protein bar is often a useful compromise, not a clean win. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Protein Bar (Generic) is C tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
